title: God's Gifts Not Soon Granted.
content:
God hears us when we pray, but yet defers
    His gifts, to exercise petitioners;
    And though a while He makes requesters stay,
    With princely hand He'll recompense delay.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "God's Gifts Not Soon Granted."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
